creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184377
patch to update graphics/openjump from 1.10 to 1.11

Version 1.11 release rev. 5434 brings some bugfixes and new features[1].


Tested on Poudriere with HEADa+i, 110a+i and 103a+i.

Also, 'portlint -AC' seems happy.


[1] https://sourceforge.net/projects/jump-pilot/files/OpenJUMP/1.11/
